text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, and
the audience is abuzz with discussion of Mihono
Bourbon's goal of winning the Triple Crown
despite her talent for sprints.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, Rice Shower cheers Mihono
Bourbon on in the midst of all the criticism.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mihono Bourbon enters the race
intent on changing the public's opinion of her.
